# akeyless_gateway_migration_gcp (Resource)

GCP Migration resource



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Migration name
- `target_location` (String) Target location in Akeyless for imported secrets

### Optional

- `gcp_key` (String, Sensitive) Base64-encoded GCP Service Account private key text
- `protection_key` (String) The name of a key that used to encrypt the secret value (if empty, the account default protectionKey key will be used)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Migration ID
